selections.name: Doc March
selections.reason: Peaking form with two recent seconds, drops in weight, well drawn.

selections.name: Bonnie Murringo
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a win and a second in last three, handles the conditions.

selections.name: Light Foot
selections.reason: Recent winner at this track, carries a light weight which is a big advantage on the wet track.

selections.name: Ghost Walker
selections.reason: Good form but carries a heavy weight penalty on the soft track which might test late.

danger_horse.name: Light Foot
danger_horse.reason: Light weight on a wet track after a recent win makes her a major threat.

selections.name: King Edward
selections.reason: Coming off back-to-back wins, peaking form, handles the distance well.

selections.name: Think I Do
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 3rd and 2nd recently, drops in weight, strong contender.

selections.name: Lightning Flash
selections.reason: Solid recent efforts including a 3rd at this track, well weighted.

selections.name: Untethered
selections.reason: Won two starts back, carries a bit of weight but has the class to feature.

danger_horse.name: Think I Do
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form and a favorable weight drop makes her very dangerous.

selections.name: Ride The River
selections.reason: Peaking form with a win and a close second recently, well drawn to strike.

selections.name: Tallingas Immortal
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick of wins, in peak form, major threat despite the draw.

selections.name: Sizzleist
selections.reason: Improving filly with a recent win, gets a great inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Justenuffsplash
selections.reason: Resuming but has won at this track and distance previously, gets the rail.

danger_horse.name: Tallingas Immortal
danger_horse.reason: Undefeated in last two starts, winning momentum cannot be ignored.

selections.name: Borjnord
selections.reason: Excellent debut run finishing second, strips fitter and drawn perfectly to break maiden.

selections.name: Jasira
selections.reason: Resuming but has two seconds from three starts, draws well and has trialed nicely.

selections.name: Sacred Inferno
selections.reason: Placed third two starts back, has upside and can figure in the finish here.

selections.name: Trooper
selections.reason: Solid 4th last start, can run into the placings if he gains a start.

danger_horse.name: Jasira
danger_horse.reason: Strong trial form and good barrier makes her a massive threat fresh.

selections.name: Blue Monday
selections.reason: Resuming but showed great ability last prep with a win and a second, well weighted.

selections.name: Sargeant Stan
selections.reason: Won two starts back, handles the conditions but needs to overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Marty Mcfly
selections.reason: Recent winner who is racing well, but the extreme outside barrier is a concern.

selections.name: Rosie's Prophecy
selections.reason: Placed third recently, carries a light weight which helps on the soft track.

danger_horse.name: Sargeant Stan
danger_horse.reason: Proven winner in this grade, very dangerous if he can cross from the wide gate.

selections.name: Ethereum Girl
selections.reason: Massive class drop from Group 1/2 company, drawn the rail, should dominate this field.

selections.name: Spread The Love
selections.reason: Won two starts back, drawn well and carries a light weight.

selections.name: Beyond Question
selections.reason: Won two starts back, drawn perfectly, but carries a heavy weight penalty.

selections.name: Romanticism
selections.reason: Won two starts back, possesses a big finish and can run into the money.

danger_horse.name: Spread The Love
danger_horse.reason: Light weight and good draw gives her a tactical advantage over the top weight.

selections.name: Touristic
selections.reason: Won the Listed Canberra Cup last start, peaking at the right time, top class.

selections.name: Plymouth
selections.reason: Consistent in Group company, drops slightly in grade, major player from a good draw.

selections.name: Bear On The Loose
selections.reason: Placed in recent starts, has the class but needs to overcome the wide gate.

selections.name: Casino Seventeen
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field, drops from Group 2/3, drawn the rail.

danger_horse.name: Plymouth
danger_horse.reason: Classy gelding dropping from Group races, perfectly drawn to upset.

selections.name: Flying Season
selections.reason: Resuming but has excellent form in higher grades, well weighted and drawn well.

selections.name: Ticklebelly
selections.reason: Won an Open race two starts back, has class but carries a weight penalty.

selections.name: Rumours Abound
selections.reason: Won two starts back, capable of a strong showing despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Sparring
selections.reason: Consistent in this grade, drawn well, but the top weight is a slight concern.

danger_horse.name: Ticklebelly
danger_horse.reason: Proven in Open company, class edge makes her very dangerous despite the weight.
